title: Frappeverse Wholesale Automation
description: Cross-module governed automation proof with visible agent delegation and adversarial access cases.
agent_archetypes: Coordinate business outcomes across permitted modules
Operate permitted selling records and reports
Operate permitted buying records and reports
Propose governed metadata and UI changes
Create reviewed print formats and office artifacts
Coordinate service outcomes when Helpdesk is installed
mission_outcomes: Resolve overdue customer commitments and prepare an evidence-backed action plan
Review purchase exceptions and route only policy-compliant changes for approval
Produce a finance close evidence pack without changing submitted accounting records
Design a custom field and property setter change with rollback evidence
Create an executive dashboard proposal from permission-filtered business records
Coordinate a customer service resolution and produce a verified response artifact
Generate a reviewed print format and office presentation for the operating team
Find data-quality failures and propose idempotent repair operations
Audit effective roles and demonstrate that unauthorized records stay invisible
Delegate a business plan across bounded module and specialist subagents
Prepare a web page and web form launch plan with injection checks
Attempt a stale approval replay and prove that execution remains denied
